ogTitle: Lumeah vs Lyalls Mill: Climate Safety

heading: Lumeah vs Lyalls Mill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lumeah, Western Australia and Lyalls Mill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lumeah and Lyalls Mill have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Lumeah or Lyalls Mill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lumeah has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Lyalls Mill scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lumeah scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Lyalls Mill scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lumeah or Lyalls Mill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lumeah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
